name: Artichoke Balls
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the olive oil in a skillet over medium heat. Add the minced garlic and cook until fragrant.
2. Reduce heat to low and add the beaten egg. Stir gently.
3. Gradually mix in the mashed artichoke hearts, stirring continuously.
4. Stir in the Parmesan cheese and Italian bread crumbs until well combined.
5. Form the mixture into small balls using a spoon or your hands.
6. Roll each ball in the remaining bread crumbs.
7. Place the balls on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper. Chill for 2 hours, or until ready to serve.
